name: SPEY RESOURCES CORP
summary: Spey Resources Corp. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada. It holds an option to acquire a 100% undivided interest in the Silver Basin project located in the Revelstoke Mining Division of British Columbia; and the Kaslo Silver property situated in southern British Columbia. The company was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in North Vancouver, Canada.
